annotations.anchor_quote: FEULLING WARP
annotations.correction: Fuelling War

annotations.anchor_quote: By strengthening strategic uncertainty among great powers intensifying security dilemma and promoting bloc politics
annotations.correction: By strengthening strategic uncertainty among great powers, intensifying security dilemma, and promoting bloc politics
annotations.comment: Add commas after 'powers' and 'dilemma' to properly separate introductory clauses.

annotations.anchor_quote: HOW MULTIPOLARITY FUELS WAR (a). Multipolarity strengthens strategic uncertainty among great powers. · US-China - Russia competition. (b). Multipolarity sharpens the security dilemma and fuels arms race. · Indo-Pacific militarization
annotations.comment: Balance outline by expanding peace promotion points to match extensive war-fuelling sub-points (a-j vs a-e).

annotations.anchor_quote: · US-China - Russia competition.
annotations.comment: Enhance sub-points with analytical explanation of how examples like 'US-China - Russia competition' fuel war, beyond mere listing.

annotations.anchor_quote: By strengthening strategic uncertainty among great powers intensifying security dilemma and promoting bloc politics, multipolarity is inadvertently fuelling war. Nevertheless, by empowering international institutions and prioritizing soft power, peace can be maintained ..
annotations.comment: Ensure outline thesis aligns with balanced coverage of both war risks and peace measures throughout sections.

annotations.anchor_quote: · BRICS de-dollarization efforts (j) Multipolarity intensifies ideological and normative competition.
annotations.comment: Outline over-emphasizes war-fueling points (a-j) compared to fewer peace measures (a-e); balance sections to cover all major aspects required by the topic.

annotations.anchor_quote: Promoting preventing diplomacy to resolve conflicts before they escalate into war.
annotations.correction: Promoting preventive diplomacy to resolve conflicts before they escalate into war.
annotations.comment: Use 'preventive' instead of 'preventing' to correctly describe proactive conflict resolution efforts.

annotations.anchor_quote: · Liberalism Vs. Authoritarianism conflict
annotations.correction: · Liberalism vs. authoritarianism conflict
annotations.comment: Change 'Vs.' to lowercase 'vs.' and lowercase subsequent words for standard abbreviation and title case consistency.

annotations.anchor_quote: · The US-China hotline restored in 2024
annotations.comment: Factual claim about hotline restoration lacks source attribution; cite reliable source for verification.

annotations.anchor_quote: (a). Strengthening and empowering international institutions to mediate conflicts. . Role of the United Nations
annotations.comment: Sub-point is descriptive without analysis; explain cause-effect relationship on how this promotes peace.

annotations.rubric_point: Flag if there is over-emphasis on one section at the expense of others.
annotations.anchor_quote: (C), Multipolarity promotes alliances and counter alliances and instigates bloc politics .. · US-led and China-led blocs (d). Multipolarity undermines consensus building promoting institutional paralysis. · UN paralysis over Syria and Yemen (e). Multipolarity exacerbates the return of hard power. · Russian invasion of Ukraine (f). Multipolarity accelerates proxy conflicts and indirect warfare · Proxy warfare in the Middle East (9). Nationalist militarism surges due to the rise of middle powers .. · Middle powers asserting regional influence . (h). Multipolarity escalates economic contestation disrupting global supply chains · US-China technological decoupling (1). Multipolarity fuels financial pluralism heightening financial security dilemma.
annotations.correction: Balance by expanding peace measures section to match war-fuelling points.
annotations.comment: Outline over-emphasizes war-fuelling points (c-j) at expense of peace measures; allocate comparable detail to both sides.

annotations.rubric_point: Flag if sub-points/arguments in the outline are merely descriptive and lack analytical depth.

annotations.rubric_point: Flag if sub-points/arguments in the outline are merely descriptive and lack analytical depth.
